column1:
** Notes: These are *direct download* URLs to the official models. I am NOT hosting these, so if any links are broken or have viruses, PLEASE go to this discussion thread and report them, and I will adjust this sheet accordingly. This sheet is just to reference all of the many releases MiHoYo has had since the 1.0 release, in one convenient location. You are still downloading directly from Biligame/Mihoyo.
Modified by Miyo Sho <meow@miyo.icu> to have better formatting so that the document is easier to parse, fixes typos and makes naming more standard instead of the names being different for the same character sometimes.
This also fixes some dead links, notes, and other inconsistencies.
